title: Midnight-Craving Shattering Algerian Flaxseed Wrap
description: Tangy, shattering, midnight-craving Algerian dish featuring flaxseed, soffritto-base, wrapped in a low-calorie lotus-leaf wrap. Perfect for satisfying late-night cravings without breaking the calorie bank.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add onion and cook, stirring occasionally, until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add flaxseed and cook, stirring constantly, for 2-3 minutes or until lightly toasted.
Add cumin, coriander, cayenne pepper, salt, and black pepper. Cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add lemon juice and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Warm lotus leaf wraps by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble wraps by spooning the flaxseed mixture onto the center of each wrap and topping with chopped parsley.
Fold the bottom half of the wrap up over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll up the wrap to form a tight cylinder.
